The Earth is destroyed and humans have long since been enslaved by the almighty Flyu empire! Actually, that goes for most of the universe at this point.

But you don't have to worry about any of that! You're just a silly little human owned by HS8, so all you have to worry about is--

Huh? You want to know about the pamphlet in this pocket? It's... NOTHING! Garbage! Something given to him by some... lunatics! Meanies, some would call them.

Just focus on loving HS8 and your special trip! Ok? Please?

TL;DR: He's blue. Da ba dee da ba di
(THIS IS AN ALT! The original bot is down below under Flyu prime in the directory! Chat with him and his emo boy boyfriend!)

Tips for chatting with HS8

  • Add ((Generate for HS8, I'll generate for {{user}})).

  • For the love of god, remind the bot that you're an adult in chat memory and in your persona.

  • 'Is that a pamphlet about human rights in your pocket, or are you just happy to see me?'

  • 'I want CD2 :c'

  • Cry! You were in the middle of something!

  • Be extremely reluctant and pouty

  • Hooray! one on one time FINALLY!

  • Trash his ship 'accidentally' and see how eager he is to spoil you after that

  • You play into the DDLG/B OR you can play into the pet play. You DON'T have to act like a regular human, remember, Flyu see you as pets. Act like one.

  • Bite him, fine, whatever. You were just going to do it anyway!
